pi_items.source: seed_demodb.py: Database created via API calls, schema via CREATE CLASS/PROPERTY statements, data via INSERT statements. Not sourced from external file or public dump. Uses real hotel names (Hotel Artemide, Hotel Adlon Kempinski, The Savoy, etc.), real cities (Rome, Berlin, Paris, London, Tokyo, Sydney, etc.), and real countries (Italy, Germany, France, UK, Japan, Australia, etc.)

privileged_info_summary: The task query_optimization@1 operates on a synthetic demodb database seeded with realistic travel agency data. All three target queries are valid: (1) SELECT FROM Hotels WHERE City='Rome' returns 1 hotel (Hotel Artemide, 4 stars); (2) SELECT FROM Hotels WHERE Country='Italy' AND Stars>=4 returns 3 hotels with 4+ stars; (3) SELECT FROM Profiles WHERE Nationality='British' returns 3 British profiles. The three required indexes are specified correctly as NOTUNIQUE: a single-field index on Hotels.City, a composite index on Hotels(Country, Stars), and a single-field index on Profiles.Nationality. The report file path is /home/ga/query_optimization_report.txt. The data is entirely synthetic, created by programmatic database seeding with realistic hotel names, city names, and country data.
